name: Kairous Acquisition Corp. Ltd
business: Kairous Acquisition Corp. Ltd is a blank check company incorporated in the Cayman Islands on March 24, 2021, formed for the purpose of effecting a merger, capital stock exchange, asset acquisition, stock purchase, reorganization or similar business combination with one or more businesses. The Company is not limited to a particular industry or sector for purposes of consummating a Business Combination, although the Company intends to focus on opportunities in Asia (excluding China).

exposures.sentence: we intend to primarily focus on fast-growing technology companies in different industry verticals, including but not limited to e-commerce, financial technology, insurance technology, digital health, digital media and digital services.

catalysts.event: Closing of Proposed Business Combination with Bamboo Mart
catalysts.sentence: The closing of the Proposed Business Combination shall occur no later than March 31, 2025.
